text:
There were three things I hated: spiders, math, and long nights. Sometimes that meant I stayed awake talking to my pet snake. That’s how I listened to my favorite book.

There were three friends I hated as much as spiders. They went together everywhere. Two would pick bugs out of each other’s fur and the third would just glare.

One night they were walking through an old park. They saw a large owl.

They didn’t think much of that. Just an old thing.

They got closer until the owl spread its wings. They scattered immediately.

They saw weird things.

That owl had yellow eyes!

Or maybe it was just a raccoon.

They didn’t think about it. Just some weird owl.

They returned home an hour later. That owl hooted at them from their ceiling. They thought it was just a big cat. Maybe a big owl.

They slept on chairs.

That night they dreamt they hatched an owl. They flew away.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|>
